chapter_title.ar: باب بَيْعِ الزَّرْعِ الْأَخْضَرِ وَ الْقَصِيلِ وَ أَشْبَاهِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 133 – Selling the green plants, and the straw, and such like

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/360)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/360)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَ يَحِلُّ شِرَاءُ الزَّرْعِ أَخْضَرَ قَالَ نَعَمْ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِ

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Hammad, from Hareyz, from Bukeyr Bin Ayn who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘Is it Permissible to buy the green plants?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Yes, there is no problem with it’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali has narrated from his father from Hammad from Hariz from Bukayr ibn ‘A‘yan who has said the following: “Upon my asking abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about buying a plantation when it only is green, he (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful.’”
